evidence: change in fraud patterns after promotional campaign
shift in feature distribution for transaction_amount
recommended_diagnostics: analysis of feature distribution over time
comparison of model performance on old and new payment channels
review of fraud patterns before and after promotional campaign
short_term_actions: monitor model performance on new payment channel
long_term_actions: incorporate new payment channel and promotional campaign data into training set
reasoning_summary: The degradation in model performance is likely due to changes in the underlying data distribution and fraud patterns, potentially caused by the introduction of a new payment channel and a promotional campaign. The significant shift in transaction_amount feature distribution supports this hypothesis. Recommended diagnostics will help confirm the root cause and guide corrective actions.
